_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Regulation (EU) 2023/1115 is the primary binding law governing EUDR obligations.
prior.source_span: REGULATION (EU) 2023/1115 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL of 31 May 2023 on the making available on the Union market and the export from the Union of certain commodities and products associated with deforestation and forest degradation and repealing Regulation (EU) No 995/2010
